title: pcr_read doc says Error::InvalidArg but code returns Error::InvalidPcrIndex
description: wolftpm/src/device.rs pcr_read doc comment says 'Returns Error::InvalidArg immediately if index is outside 0-23', but the code returns Error::InvalidPcrIndex(index). Users who write 'match dev.pcr_read(x) { Err(Error::InvalidArg(_)) => ... }' based on the docs will silently miss the error. Fix: update the doc comment to reference Error::InvalidPcrIndex.
